use tokio::sync::Mutex;
use std::sync::Arc;

struct AppState {
    db: Database,
    counter: Mutex<u64>,
}

impl AppState {
    async fn increment(&self) {
        let mut count = self.counter.lock().await;
        *count += 1;
    }

    async fn process_request(&self, id: u64) -> String {
        let mut count = self.counter.lock().await;
        *count += 1;
        format!("processed {}", id)
    }

    async fn get_count(&self) -> u64 {
        let count = self.counter.lock().await;
        *count
    }
}

struct Database;

async fn handle_request(state: Arc<AppState>, id: u64) -> String {
    state.process_request(id).await
}
